title.en: The unimaginable gift of heaven and earth has d...

content.en:
Rumble!!!!!

The unimaginable gift of heaven and earth has descended.

After all, he had killed too many Supreme Dao Void Demons, and the Heaven and Earth Origin Rewards were naturally many.

With these Heaven and Earth Origin Gifts alone, it would take him a long time to refine.

The other side.

Ye Tian's true body copy body shuttled through the void realm, and finally approached the location recorded on the map.

During this period, he also encountered a lot of Supreme Dao Void Demons, but none of them were very powerful, and he avoided them all.

Basically, as long as it's not very unlucky, it's unlikely that you'll encounter the Eightfold Supreme Path Void Demon.

"It's here!"

Ye Tian came to the location marked on the map, and it was here that the Wuji Heavenly Emperor estimated that he had harvested that purple stone.

This area is filled with a green glow, covering a far and distant area.

Ye Tian did not hesitate and directly broke into this area.

He didn't know what was going on, so he made a copy of the body outside.

In this way, even if the copy body falls, it can continue to come in without having to rush again.

......

Within the purple area, the perceptual range is not large.

But soon, Ye Tian ran into trouble.

A purple creature emerged and attacked Ye Tian.

【Zhidao Purple Python】

The strength of this Supreme Dao Purple Python is okay, not strong, that is, the strength of the Sevenfold Supreme Dao Realm.

Ye Tian pointed at it casually and directly killed this Supreme Dao Purple Python.

Immediately, he studied the corpse of this Supreme Purple Python and found that there was the breath of purple stone inside its body.

Either it had eaten that purple stone, or it had touched that purple stone.

"Sure enough, those purple stones of the Infinite Heavenly Emperor were obtained here!"

Ye Tian was extremely sure.

Then he began to look for the purple stone.

Moreover, he had a discovery at this time, that is, this purple mist would also erode his origin and damage his foundation, but it was not as serious as that green stone.

"It's a pity that the cultivation of the Supreme Dao Purple Python has reached the Sevenfold Supreme Dao Realm, and there is no way to replicate its body, otherwise it should be easier to use the Supreme Dao Purple Python body to find the purple stone!" Ye Tian thought to himself.

As time passed, Ye Tian finally found a purple stone, the stone was not big, it was about the same as the purple stone he had obtained before.

"Found a piece, good start!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.

Subsequently, he continued his search for the purple stone.

Gradually, he found more and more purple stones.

Of course, he had also encountered more powerful creatures, and it was difficult for the Seven Realms to deal with them.

"When the Wuji Heavenly Emperor came here, it is estimated that he had not yet broken through to the Eightfold Dao Realm, and he must have paid a lot of price to find some purple stones!" Ye Tian guessed.

Ye Tian's strength was second only to the Eightfold Dao Realm, so there was no danger.

After he found a lot of purple stones, he came out again, placed them on the replica body of the outside world, and then continued to come in to find the purple stones.

After a while, the purple stones on the periphery were not easy to find.

So, he went deep into the purple area to find the purple stone.

Not long after he entered, he found that the purple mist here was even more terrifying to the erosion of the origin, and if he stayed too long and his foundation was seriously damaged, he probably wouldn't want to break through to a higher realm.

"The Infinite Heavenly Emperor has definitely not been to the depths of this area!"

And Ye Tian came in.

He ignored the erosion of the origin by these purple mists, as long as he could find the purple stone.

......

"Crisis!"

Ye Tian felt as if he was being targeted by some terrifying creature.

In the next second, an incomparably terrifying creature appeared.

【To the Road Ape】

This is a supreme Dao ruin ape comparable to the top eightfold supreme Dao realm, and its strength is much stronger than Ye Tian, definitely not inferior to the strength of the blood killer.

And his origin was seriously eroded, and he couldn't burn the origin to escape, plus this area was its home field, Ye Tian didn't succeed in escaping, and was directly caught by the other party.

Rumble!!!!

A terrifying big hand directly crushed Ye Tian's body.

Soon, he was killed.

"A replica body has fallen, and the depths of this area are really too dangerous!"

In such a dangerous place, and the purple stones would hurt the origin and foundation, those powerful Supreme Dao realms themselves were very geniuses, so they would naturally not be willing to give up the foundation and collect these purple stones to comprehend the sixth sequence of Supreme Dao rules.

And ordinary Supreme Dao Realms with no potential are not eligible to obtain such treasures.

Therefore, even if this place is discovered, there will be no Supreme Dao Realm to venture into it to collect purple stones.

The Wuji Heavenly Emperor was able to sacrifice his future and get out alive, which is probably lucky.

Subsequently, Ye Tian let a real body copy body enter here, this time the aura was restrained, plus a little more careful, a little luck, and successfully found a relatively large purple stone.

"Hey, this purple stone is not only bigger, but it also seems to be of different quality!"

Ye Tian was surprised.

This purple stone is estimated to be a higher quality type, and its value will naturally be higher, but the erosion of the origin must also be more powerful.

But for Ye Tian, the value of this purple stone is naturally higher.

Immediately.

He swallowed this purple stone to refine and test the effect.

Rumble!!!!

His origin was eroded faster, but he also felt more Sixth Sequence Supreme Dao rules, and the effect was much better than the previous purple stone.

"Sure enough, it's a better purple stone!"

Ye Tian was excited.

He had to collect some of these purple stones.

So, he sacrificed a replica body just to find some more of this high-quality purple stone and bring it out.

The years passed, and before you knew it, a long time had passed.

At this time.

Ye Tian had already collected a lot of high-quality purple stones, but he had also lost many copies of his body.

this day.

Ye Tian was about to leave, because there weren't many purple stones in this area, and it was difficult for him to continue to find them.

So, there is no need to continue to stay here.

So, he prepared to return to the Infinity Domain.

......

Heavenly Blood Battlefield.

Ye Tian was still absorbing the gift of the Heaven and Earth Origin, and he had not yet completely absorbed and refined.

And his cultivation had already reached the middle stage of the Fifth Rank Dao Realm.

But it is estimated that there is no way to use these heaven and earth origin gifts to raise the cultivation to the late stage of the fifth level of the Dao realm.

this day.

The refinement of the Heaven and Earth Origin Gift is over, and Ye Tian's cultivation is not far from the late stage of the Fifth Rank Dao Realm, but if he wants to step into this realm, it will take a long time to do it.

"It's time to leave the Celestial Dragon Domain!"

Ye Tian left the Heavenly Blood Battlefield, took the compensation given by the Heavenly Dragon Domain, and then handed over the battlefield order, and left the Heavenly Dragon Domain, passed through the Winter Night Fortress, and returned to the Infinite Domain.
